integrations.name: GitHub
integrations.description: Search code, manage issues and pull requests, and inspect repos via the GitHub API.
integrations.notes: Current managed connector works with bearer tokens today; GitHub OAuth is a strong candidate for a future one-click connect flow.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch the authenticated GitHub user profile.

auth.credentialHelp: Classic or fine-grained personal access token from GitHub settings.

integrations.name: Slack
integrations.description: Read channels, post messages, and search workspace history from your agent.
integrations.notes: Uses Slack's official hosted MCP server with confidential OAuth user-token auth.

envFields.label: Team / Workspace ID
envFields.helperText: First get your [Slack URL](https://slack.com/help/articles/221769328-Locate-your-Slack-URL-or-ID#find-your-url). Then use that to get your [Workspace ID](https://slack.com/help/articles/221769328-Locate-your-Slack-URL-or-ID#find-your-workspace-or-org-id).

envFields.label: Bot token
envFields.helperText: You'll need to create or have access to a [Slack App](https://github.com/zencoderai/slack-mcp-server#slack-bot-setup) to get a Bot token.

integrations.installHint: Create a Slack app with the required scopes, then paste its bot token below.

integrations.name: Tavily
integrations.description: Production-grade web search optimized for LLM agents. Free tier available.
integrations.installHint: Paste your Tavily API key - the official tavily-mcp package runs via npx.

envFields.label: Tavily API key
envFields.helperText: API key from your Tavily dashboard.

integrations.name: Linear
integrations.description: Browse and update Linear issues, cycles, and projects from the agent.
integrations.notes: Popular among modern product engineering teams and already useful to this repo's users.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Query issues from Linear via GraphQL.

defaultTool.name: list_issues
defaultTool.description: Query issues from Linear via GraphQL.

integrations.installHint: Linear's hosted MCP server uses your Linear OAuth login — no key required.

integrations.name: Notion
integrations.description: Read and edit Notion pages, databases, and blocks via Notion's MCP server.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Search pages and databases in the connected Notion workspace.

defaultTool.name: post_search
defaultTool.description: Search pages and databases in the connected Notion workspace.

envFields.label: Internal integration token
envFields.helperText: Internal integration token from your Notion integrations page.

integrations.name: Ordinal
integrations.description: Social media posts, profiles, analytics, labels, approvals, and engagements.
integrations.notes: Official MCP server backed by Ordinal's API with API-key (Bearer) auth.

registrationDefaults.credentialHelp: API key from your Ordinal workspace settings, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

auth.credentialHelp: API key from your Ordinal workspace settings, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

integrations.name: ElevenLabs
integrations.description: Generate speech, clone voices, and transcribe audio via ElevenLabs.
integrations.notes: Official API-key connector backed by ElevenLabs' published OpenAPI spec.

registrationDefaults.credentialHelp: Personal or workspace ElevenLabs API key sent in the xi-api-key header.

auth.credentialHelp: Personal or workspace ElevenLabs API key sent in the xi-api-key header.

integrations.name: Bitbucket

integrations.notes: Popular in Atlassian-centric teams and complements Jira/Confluence.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch the authenticated Bitbucket user profile.

defaultTool.name: get_current_user
defaultTool.description: Fetch the authenticated Bitbucket user profile.

integrations.name: GitLab
integrations.description: Repositories, issues, merge requests, pipelines, and DevSecOps.
integrations.notes: Major Git hosting platform and natural expansion beyond GitHub.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch the authenticated GitLab user profile.

defaultTool.name: get_current_user
defaultTool.description: Fetch the authenticated GitLab user profile.
